programme.desc: With no guests to entertain at the chateau this year, the overhaul of the orangery continues. All the family come together to build an open kitchen, create a pop-up restaurant and cook a menu of memories featuring dishes from Dick and Angel's years together

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a 24-year-old man who is having an epileptic seizure in a supermarket, while an ambulance crew treats an elderly woman whose nose will not stop bleeding

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Joe Lycett in the words-and-numbers game, while Mat Ewins joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: A look back at some of the most memorable dates and other moments from the First Dates Hotel, including the meeting between policewoman Emma and carpenter Luke, which promised to be one of the most passionate dates in the show's history. Meanwhile, Darill quickly learns there are certain things you should keep to yourself when he sits down with single mum Millie. Other pairings include part-time actor Simon and Disney-loving fellow thespian James, and 83-year-old former jazz singer Dorit and 82-year-old poetry lover John

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares spiced cauliflower rice pie and a vegetable curry, and demonstrates an unusual technique for flipping his creation out of the pan. He also serves up a hot, filled sandwich containing a salmon fillet with jalapeños and Cajun spice

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fiancees and live-in landlords Paul Wright and Dave McDermott welcome their rivals to the Coach and Horses in Compton in West Sussex, where they hope that their touch of country class will be the cream of the crop. When the guests arrive, Hannah and Ibrahim drink it all in, but the decor comes up short for Matt and Rich and a bad night's sleep doesn't leave Ibrahim in high spirits. At breakfast, the fry-up falls flat for some of the guests, and the feedback leaves a bitter taste in the hosts' mouths

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Road Trip
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is in the Spanish region of Almería, where he meets two Britons setting up a glampsite inspired by Spaghetti Westerns and a couple of olive farmers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Yvonne and Graham want a holiday bolthole in the Algarve, as close as possible to the harbour and beach, so Ben Hillman lines up five contenders for their budget of £135,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Long-time friends Jackie Venn and Jane Howes adore Italy and have pooled together all their savings seeking a renovation project in the region of Abruzzo. They want a substantial property offering views, olive trees and a layout that suits their different needs, so turn to property expert Sara Damergi to help them achieve their objectives

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Semi-retired travel rep Nicola Harrison from Dorset has spent a season 22 years ago looking after holiday-makers in the Algarve, and now fancies moving there herself. She enlists the help of Jasmine Harman who looks for properties that will aid Nicola in the next chapter of her life

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five cooks from in and around Harrogate, North Yorkshire, battle to win the £1,000 prize in the culinary contest. First to take on hosting duties is farm girl Jane Steele, who hopes a combination of innovative recipes and fancy wine will win over her guests - horse enthusiast Cassy Bell, photographer Simon Meyer, country gent Alasdair Moore and adventurous punk and cupcake seller Cathy McConaghy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Horse enthusiast Cassy Bell hosts the second dinner party in Harrogate, North Yorkshire, hoping her jockey-themed evening and gastro-pub menu will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cathy McConaghy hosts the third dinner party in Harrogate, North Yorkshire, where she decides to return to her Irish roots and serve a menu of home-made soda bread, cockle soup, oysters, roast lamb, and stout-infused sticky toffee pudding as she vies for the £1,000 prize. However, not all of her guests are impressed with the choice of food being dished up

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Simon Meyer is the fourth dinner-party host in Harrogate, North Yorkshire. He takes a laid-back approach to the task, but his chicken soup starter goes down so well the guests' comments leave him struggling to retain his composure

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Country gent Alasdair Moore hosts the final dinner party in Harrogate, and hopes to impress his guests with his specially selected wines and 'proper' menu. While his monkfish is well received, an early slip-up dents his confidence, and a risky parlour game does not endear him to farm lady Jane Steele. As the evening progresses, his competitors rate their experience, before the winner of the £1,000 cash prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and Neil are about to start their next big adventure and move from their home in Exeter to start a new life in Lecce in southern Italy. They want a property that has a guest annex to accommodate friends and family, and that's close to the beach so Neil can surf whenever he wants. Armed with a budget of £200,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Brothers Peter and David share a home in Wolverhampton and have decided to jointly buy a holiday home in the Spanish town of Torrevieja. With a budget of £100,000, they want a home that not only ticks all their boxes but also suits their large extended family too, so turn to Jean Johansson for advice

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their family's future

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Two sets of house-hunters look for properties in north London. Kirstie Allsopp is with single mum and businesswoman Digi, who has £1.25million to find the perfect place for her, daughter Emily and mum Queelan. However, it soon proves a challenge to find the family home that suits all their needs. Phil Spencer helps Rebecca and Sohail, who have raised their family in rented accommodation and now want a place of their own now. The problem is finding a place they will love when their rental is worth at least £200,000 more than their budget to buy

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Assassin's Creed (2016)
programme.desc: A convict facing execution is recruited for a secret experiment where his consciousness is sent back in time to experience the life of his ancestor - a 15th-century ancestor battling a secret society. With the same evil organisation plotting world domination in the present, he must master his predecessor's skills and unlock his secret knowledge to defeat them. Action adventure based on the video game series, starring Michael Fassbender, Marion Cotillard, Jeremy Irons and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a 24-year-old man who is having an epileptic seizure in a supermarket, while an ambulance crew treats an elderly woman whose nose will not stop bleeding

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to Sarah Kendall, Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack and Mike Wozniak. Sarah still leads the race to win Greg's stupendous skull-trophy, but the chasing pack are closing in, hoping beyond hope to score points by creatively munching on snacks, drawing pretty wings and being brutally honest about emergency plane landings. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig welcome comedians Joe Lycett and Lee Mack, writer and actor Griff Rhys Jones and TV presenter Melanie Sykes to the famous tent. The celebrities face three tricky tests set by judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood - beginning with a blondies signature challenge, then a testing technical and concluding with the opportunity to reveal their secret passions with their cake showstopper. Which of the famous faces will impress those judges?

programme.title: The Money Maker
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and investor Eric Collins sets out to help struggling British businesses, offering them not only his expertise and business acumen but also a game-changing investment designed to change their fortunes around. He begins in Manchester at repair and restoration company Prymo. Lively CEO Jasen says he has never been busier, but Eric wants to know exactly what has been keeping him busy as there isn't enough profit to expand

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The group get wet and wild on a jet-skiing outing, but the fun stops when Brendan announces a dramatic voting twist for the final few days

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. First up are Rich and Matt from the Cliff House Hotel, and after tackling Paul and Dave's complaints about the lack of blinds in the bathroom, it's another pair's payment that could prove curtains for their chances in the competition

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Road Trip
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix's tour of Europe takes him to the Périgord-Limousin National Park, where he spent his childhood. He meets two green-fingered Britons who have just launched a plant nursery, and checks in with a Jersey couple launching a gîte business and two Londoners trying to set up a log cabin business at the edge of their lake

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Debbie and John go looking for a new life and home on the Costa del Sol with help from Jean Johansson, who lines up five potential properties for their £250,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps former firefighter Gary Sheen and his partner Kevin Lambert from Essex find a new home in the Altea region of Spain's Costa Blanca. With a budget of £175,000, the couple are torn between a two-bedroom apartment with jaw-dropping views, or a town house opposite one of their favourite restaurants

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman meets Peter and Karen Williams from Shropshire, who fell in love with Portugal's eastern Algarve 12 years ago and now want to relocate there permanently. Jasmine finds them five homes suited to their £150,000 budget, including a property reduced by £50,000, and a house that feels just like their place back in the UK

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first in a week of parties in Norwich is hosted by hotel events manager Jo-Anne, who hopes a glamorous gourmet affair will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize. As the five competitors take their places at Jo-Anne's dinner table, conversation takes an eclectic turn, covering everything from the Queen, Josie Gibson and Linda Robson to leopard-print pants and hovercraft

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Down-to-earth multimedia manager Karena hosts the second night in Norwich, where she hopes to impress her guests with some slightly more refined pub-style food, despite questionable table manners and hairy fish during the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former professional skier Jake hosts the third dinner party in Norwich, and hopes to impress his fellow contestants with a menu of fine dining and alpine classics. With the help of his mother, he decorates his house to create a winter wonderland, but the games he wants to play leave some guests feeling as if they are at a children's party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Music shop manager Barnaby takes the reins of the fourth night in Norwich, and after a fish-inspired starter and a main course of seafood linguine, his guests appear to be getting into the party spirit. However, it seems his only chance of scooping the prize money rests with his entertainment after ending up with a huge pile of leftovers - and a bleeding finger

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the night of the final dinner party in Norwich and the turn of business advisor Richard to host. He believes his Thai cooking will give him the edge in the competition, but has his work cut out as Jo-Anne is out to test his ego. Meanwhile, punk rocker Richard feels the spirit of rebellion and hopes to claim the cash prize for himself before the winner is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh champion sausage-maker Steve and his wife Helen have travelled the world in search of the perfect holiday home and have decided that Torrox on the Costa del Sol is for them. Scarlette Douglas pulls out all the stops to show five properties within her budget of £95,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a family from North Shields search for a property in the picturesque coastal town of La Duquesa on Spain's Costa del Sol

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In Cumbria, the architect meets Harry, who wants to take a derelict Victorian railway signal box and turn it into a garden summerhouse for his home, while in Derby, 22-year-old wood carver Sophie hopes to transform a campervan into a mobile home and showroom to use to sell her wares at festivals. On his Italian road trip, George discovers a spectacular house made almost entirely out of glass near Lake Lugano, and at the wilderness retreat, he and Will struggle to get the walls right

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple in Worcestershire who have given up the rat race, selling their town house to buy some land in the country. With just £50,000 they set out to construct their own home from the most unlikely of starting points - four old portable office buildings. Schoolteacher Lauren, who discovered an enormous pond hidden under decking in the back garden, sets out to transform the plot into a beach-themed holiday retreat. As George's Italian road trip continues, he travels to the old town of Mathi, north of Turin, where he finds a modernist gem of a home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Two sets of house-hunters look for properties in north London. Kirstie Allsopp is with single mum and businesswoman Digi, who has £1.25million to find the perfect place for her, daughter Emily and mum Queelan. However, it soon proves a challenge to find the family home that suits all their needs. Phil Spencer helps Rebecca and Sohail, who have raised their family in rented accommodation and now want a place of their own now. The problem is finding a place they will love when their rental is worth at least £200,000 more than their budget to buy

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: Mental health nurse Jim counsels people who are struggling with self-isolation, while paramedics Karina and James respond to a call from a man who claims to be armed and is threatening suicide. Despite losing his mother to Covid-19, paramedic Richard continues working on the frontline while also managing his anxiety about taking the virus home to his wife, whose complex health issues put her at high risk

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies sets tasks to Sarah Kendall, Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack and Mike Wozniak. Sarah still leads the race to win Greg's stupendous skull-trophy, but the chasing pack are closing in, hoping beyond hope to score points by creatively munching on snacks, drawing pretty wings and being brutally honest about emergency plane landings. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes the oldest ever picker to the studio, 75-year-old naturist Ian from North Yorkshire. Ian has recently been exploring his sexuality and needs help to find his perfect partner. Next up is 30-year-old waitress Kerry from Aberdeen, who finds the smell of men's armpits gets her hot under the collar and wants a man with a sweet scent who can also get experimental in the bedroom

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig welcome comedians Joe Lycett and Lee Mack, writer and actor Griff Rhys Jones and TV presenter Melanie Sykes to the famous tent. The celebrities face three tricky tests set by judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood - beginning with a blondies signature challenge, then a testing technical and concluding with the opportunity to reveal their secret passions with their cake showstopper. Which of the famous faces will impress those judges?

programme.title: Trip Hazard: My Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Rosie Jones is joined by fellow comedian Jenny Eclair for an 'outdoorsy' adventure on the island of Anglesey in north Wales. The pair discover they'd make terrible farmers when they try their hand at sheep herding and visit the island's many Neolithic stone sites. Rosie takes Jenny on a horse ride along the waterfront, and they take to the skies on the world's fastest zip wire. As the sun sets, they meet a coast craft expert, who teaches them essential survival skills on one of the island's many picturesque beaches - and it's quickly evident they'd not last more than few hours if left to fend for themselves. Narrated by Olivia Colman

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Celine, a 24-year-old globetrotter, experiences a holiday on a wet, Welsh campsite with all seven of the noisy Jarman family. Putting up her own tent is just one of the challenges she faces, along with feeding the whole family for the same price she would normally spend on a starter and a drink at her favourite restaurant

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: This time, paediatric sister Jemma Wray treats two critically ill children - 10-year-old Kai has been having seizures, and 18-month-old Joel is struggling to breathe. Elsewhere, nurse Will Gibbons looks after a 28-year-old patient who has been in a motorbike accident, and 51-year-old Andrew comes into the hospital after damaging his fingers with a circular saw

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A broken down train causes major disruption during the morning rush hour and the locomotive of the famous Riviera sleeper train is pressed into service to shift it. Staff have to deal with a series of medical emergencies at the station, including a fall on an escalator, an epileptic seizure and a suspected cardiac arrest

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: A super sleuth attempts to bring down a seven-and-a-half-ton fly-by-night dumper, proving that cameras never lie. And in Braintree, Essex, former military man Stu is out to blanket his entire county in hidden CCTV, in order to catch the culprits plaguing his patch

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford is ended when CS gas is used to bring a determined speeder to justice, while teams are out on quiet back roads as they track two cars that are thought to be connected with various firearms offences. Plus, burglars find out they cannot outrun the cops when weighed down with a quad bike and trailing a cloud of cannabis behind them

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford's crowded streets ends very suddenly and the driver claims he just wants to get home to eat his takeaway while it is still hot. But is that the whole story? In Harrogate, a volatile drink-driver's rapid mood swings prove a test for the cops, while a large stash of cannabis is found at the scene of a major collision, which has left one person with life-threatening injuries. A couple suspected of dealing drugs are chased down and taken to the station, where they provide the traffic team with contrasting reactions to being held in custody. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers Hayley and Ben can barely believe their eyes when they encounter a drunk driver in the fast lane of the M6, and dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue when he answers an emergency distress call. Plus, a monster-truck owner tries to give police the slip and a pizza-delivery driver gets a special order from the interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A huge haul of cash is uncovered during a routine stop, leaving Duggie speechless, and a van driver tries to ram an interceptor on the busy M6. Meanwhile, Hayley and Ben rush to a frightening accident on the motorway, dog-handler Barry catches a burglar and the air ambulance is scrambled to a crash involving a school bus on a country road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Hayley rushes to help two badly injured motorcyclists, while Ross and John haul in a drink-driver who has left a trail of destruction in his wake. Duncan has to escort a 176-wheel monster truck through Workington, Steve deals with a boy racer, Tom goes undercover on the trail of some suspected bike thieves, and Duggie plays gooseberry on a couple's first date

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: It is nurse Jade's final shift in Barnsley Hospital's casualty department and auxiliary nurse Mike is determined to give her a good send-off. In paediatrics, registrar Dr Nick Mani is seeing a nine-month-old boy who has a very high temperature, while physiotherapist Jovan helps a 90-year-old woman who banged her head in the hospital restaurant

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: A mysterious woman arrives, offering help to Ned at The Hive. Susan refuses to choose between her two very passionate teachers

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella gets fed up with Ryder and Chloe, the Surf Club is in a shambles on account of John trusting Susie. Justin gets into a horrific accident after a fight with Leah and John

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The retailer prepares for Christmas, the most important time of year for supermarkets with preparations made as much as 10 months in advance. With Christmas TV adverts becoming more competitive than ever, Iceland enters into an arrangement with Disney to tie their promotional campaign to the release of Frozen 2. They also launch some new festive products, including a chocolate and caramel pudding and a complete Christmas dinner in a pie

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan help a woman who has not unpacked two years after moving into her first floor flat, and who struggles to give up things she does not need

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Deep-cleaning expert George and his team face one of their toughest assignments yet - a house in Crosby, Merseyside that is almost literally bursting at the seams with clutter. Owner Paul has decided enough is enough, and he wants to sell his house and hoard to fund his retirement. But the property is infested with vermin and the kitchen a biohazard, so it is not going to be an easy sell in its current state

programme.title: Gypsy Eviction: The Battle for Dale Farm
programme.desc: Although travellers legally owned the land of Dale Farm in Essex, they did not have planning permission to develop it and the site grew in size. Early attempts by the council to move them on were thwarted by the New Labour government, and the adoption of the Human Rights Laws resulted in a stalemate between the resident travellers and the council that lasted a decade. Through interviews with people on both sides of the eviction, this film looks back at the dramatic events of 2011

programme.title: 5 Clues That Caught the Killer: Rhys Jones
programme.desc: Documentary examining the investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones, a schoolboy shot dead on his way home from football training in 2007. The programme looks at how police managed to make the vital breakthroughs that finally put Rhys' killer behind bars, featuring interviews with police officers and specialists directly involved in the case

programme.title: When Kids Kill
programme.desc: The case of a London gang who murdered 17-year-old Marcel Addai after an ongoing feud on social media, which saw gang members threatening each other in homemade rap videos

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in Blackpool, one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.desc: A mysterious woman arrives, offering help to Ned at The Hive. Susan refuses to choose between her two very passionate teachers

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A track circuit failure has been detected at Platform 5 and instructions from the signalling centre are to close it, putting the pressure on the Track Response team to fix the problem. British Transport Police are out in force as crowds of football fans pass through Paddington, while in the control room, Graeme is shocked to witness a young man walking dangerously close to the edge of a platform

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following Hampshire's volunteer waste champions, who are using drone technology to collar the rogue waste operators upsetting their patch

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Thieves dragging a stolen generator on one wheel along town and country roads cause chaos, smashing the barriers on a closed level crossing and coming close to causing a train crash. A van with a surprising load is tracked using state-of-the-art technology in a game of cat and mouse, and a high-stakes hunt for a stolen van and mini-digger on the M1 nearly leads to carnage. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A murder suspect is pursued and trapped in Bradford by a task force of traffic cops and officers from a homicide unit. Meanwhile, another squadron of cars is deployed to catch a speeding car-theft suspect, whose risk-taking only ends when he hits a tree. Across the county, the cops are forced to intervene when a drink-driver is attacked by residents who want revenge for the damage he has done to their parked cars. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Andy collars a suspect thought to have caused criminal damage at a house party, but the father of the host arrives and inflames the situation, while Duggie and Mark respond to a report of a car that has been abandoned after being involved in a crash near Carlisle. In Barrow-in-Furness, the Tactical Support Group calls on Barry and his dog Lucky to sniff out some evidence after a drugs raid

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a Taser and an offensive mouth

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken youth in a domestic dispute and Martin turns detective to catch a drink-driver who thinks she can get one over on the interceptors. A pizza delivery driver take fast food to the extreme, Doug gets to grips with a burglar and the hunt is on for Lincoln's answer to Harry Houdini

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary filmed inside Barnsley casualty department. Paramedics call to say they are rushing in a critically ill one-day-old baby, a road worker is brought in after having his foot run over by a mini-digger and a woman seeks treatment following a surprising reaction to a beauty treatment. Sister Jane meets one of her heroes when Barnsley cricketing legend Dickie Bird arrives for a follow-up appointment

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul puts his best side forward for Sheila Canning. The other Sheila feels guilty for keeping a package, and wants to make amends. Patients start refusing treatment from Karl

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin is dragged out of the waves, and realises he and Leah are on the same side and got conned by Susie. Christian runs into Lewis, who cannot help but antagonise him

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: The real stories of more people living the high life by the sea on a low budget. B&B owner Chris has dropped his prices to keep turnover high. Will an incoming hen party be happy with his cheap-and-cheerful approach? Ian tries to attract punters to his donkey ride business, Sharon's dream of running the town's first Caribbean restaurant proves to be a tall order, and at her static home on a retirement park, Sandra organises a posthumous birthday party for her late husband

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Doctors in the accident and emergency department treat a patient in cardiac arrest. Junior doctor George Kay leads the resus team, while Hannah Ryan steps in to head up the nurses. Meanwhile, cyclist Garry is rushed into hospital after a head-on collision with a metal gate, and elderly patient Larry comes to hospital with his wife Molly after he had a fall at home

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A woman collapses unexpectedly during a day out with her family to an adventure park, and is left unable to move or walk. The trauma team leader diagnoses a bleed on her brain that requires urgent surgery. A neurosurgeon attempts to drain the build-up of fluid in her brain. A motorist suffers a cardiac arrest behind the wheel, caused by a large clot in an artery, and a van driver is airlifted to hospital after a major traffic collision

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A woman arrives by air ambulance after falling 30ft off a castle wall and is rushed to the CT scanner to check for any life-threatening internal injuries, while a 68-year-old man in Minors is losing a lot of blood after cutting his hand on a broken glass at home. Dr Ibraheem treats a 25-year-old who has had a nasty accident while out walking his dog, with X-rays showing that he has ripped his shoulder out of joint

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Offering an insight into the life or death incidents faced by specialist emergency response teams. They cover everything from car crashes and stabbings to cardiac arrests

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Providing sexual services in their own homes, escorts are one of the biggest growth areas in the British sex business. This episode follows three independent escorts, each of whom pride themselves on being in control, and say they enjoy the luxury of selling sex out of choice rather than necessity

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of Penny Beale in November 2001. Her boyfriend Michael Moffat claimed she fell down the stairs while drunk - but her mother knew better. To the police, Michael presented as a charming, helpful man who had been struggling to save his girlfriend from her alcohol and drug addictions. Penny's mother was aware of another side of him however - he was a drunk, abusive and violent man who was now trying to get away with her daughter's murder

programme.title: The Disappearance
programme.desc: Susan makes an important discovery, and Fred helps Henry to decode the clues left by the kidnapper

programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Dasha from Worcestershire, who is accustomed to the finest things in life, joins Kate Harris and five of her eight kids on a basic camping trip to west Wales

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Documentary filmed inside Barnsley casualty department. Paramedics call to say they are rushing in a critically ill one-day-old baby, a road worker is brought in after having his foot run over by a mini-digger and a woman seeks treatment following a surprising reaction to a beauty treatment. Sister Jane meets one of her heroes when Barnsley cricketing legend Dickie Bird arrives for a follow-up appointment

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: Network Rail prepares for two days of disruption as Storm Eleanor closes in, while reports come in of a packed Paddington to Penzance train being struck and damaged by a falling tree in Hungerford. A routine track patrol in Oxford unearths a problem which, if left, could have significant implications on the busy commuter line

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a 16-year-old car thief in the early hours before he does any major damage, while a high-speed car and foot chase through the centre of Bradford ends in a gruesome smash. A young woman risks driving while drunk, but is saved by her black box, while another young speeder writes his car off in a spectacular fireball and emerges with a broken back. In Leeds, cops pursue a car obeying all the rules of the road - except the one requiring it to stop for the police

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The return after a break of the documentary following the work of officers from police forces across Yorkshire. Officers crack down on uninsured drivers whose recklessness raises everyone's premiums and kills more than 130 road users every year. In Halifax, a high-speed pursuit after one of these criminals ends in a devastating collision and foot race, while in Leeds a van courier is stopped, fails to deliver the correct paperwork to the cops, and then fails a drug test. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Sgt Carlin arrests a gang of van thieves and uncovers a major criminal operation in the process, while a late-night compost thief is caught on his way out of the shower. Officers hunt for a trucker wielding a baseball bat who has apparently succumbed to road rage and vegetarian Craggy rides to the rescue of a lorry load of calves on the A46. Elsewhere, Brian cracks down on a barbaric blood sport, Jon faces an unexploded bomb, and two fuel thieves plough straight into the interceptors' precious BMW

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit are at the forefront of a raid against suspected drug traffickers, the hunt is on for a driver who has fled the scene of a horrific crash, and Rich Precious and Sean Baxter are left lagging far behind as they chase a speeding biker. Dan Brigginshaw is on duty at Spalding's annual flower show, and Sean Brennan deals with a young man who thinks he can throw his weight around after a boozy night out

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A van thief gives officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit the runaround before taking a disastrous wrong turn. Dan joins a manhunt but finds dodgy diesel instead, while Jon wades into a late-night assault involving a pair of TV legends. Big Jim reports a boy racer to his mum and delivers a dressing down to a driver with a taste for rude gestures

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila C gains access to The Hive's financial data, infuriating Paul and throwing suspicion on Ned, who denies helping her. Mackenzie and Hendrix get closer as they fight a spider

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac is brought home from hospital, depressed and wanting to isolate herself. Lewis receives the autopsy findings, and ditches his date with Jasmine

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan help a woman who has not unpacked two years after moving into her first floor flat, and who struggles to give up things she does not need

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Wealthy Cheshire entrepreneur Jude Cisse takes her family to experience a caravan break in Devon, and has trouble adjusting to the lack of privacy their crammed campsite provides. The hard-up McQueens from Peckham, who survive on dad Jay's £450 a week bus-driver wage, last went on holiday two years ago in a caravan on the South Coast. They take a trip to Jude's private, staffed villa in Morocco and are initially awe-struck at the luxury they experience

programme.title: White House Down (2013)
programme.desc: A policeman is turned down for his dream job as a secret service bodyguard to the president. While taking his daughter on a tour of the White House, he gets the chance to prove himself when terrorists seize control of the building, putting the head of state's life in his hands. Action thriller, with Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes (2015)
programme.desc: A tight-knit FBI team is torn apart when the daughter of one of the agents is raped and murdered, and the case goes unsolved. Years later, a member of the team uncovers a new clue that he hopes will allow him to bring the killer to justice. However, the victim's grieving mother is dissatisfied with the law and takes matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Julia Roberts, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Nicole Kidman

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personalities of some of the world's most infamous murderers, and consider what may have motivated them to carry out horrific crimes

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary examining some of Britain's most notorious murders, charting the last few days leading up to the killing from the perspectives of both perpetrator and victim, using dramatic reconstruction to pinpoint the trigger that set each one in motion, providing in-depth psychological analysis and scrutiny of the devious and calculating plans the killers formulated. This episode examines the events leading up to the death of Natalie Jarvis in 2012, who was murdered by Adam Whelehan, a man with whom she had been having a casual relationship

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Amish country in search of a special handmade quilt, but finds herself embroiled in yet another baffling murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US marine's parachute fails to open during a training exercise and he plunges to his death, leaving the team to determine whether he was murdered. The man had a reputation for good fortune and invariably walked away from accidents unscathed - but his luck at the poker table may have cost him dearly. Mark Harmon and David McCallum star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A naval commander's body is washed ashore along with the bullet-riddled corpses of two drug traffickers, suggesting he was involved in illicit activities. Gibbs refuses to believe the worst and tries to prove the man's innocence by finding whoever else was involved in the shoot-out. Guest starring Emilie de Ravin (Lost)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a Hispanic man found dead from a severe chest trauma after being involved in a staged car accident with two other illegal immigrants - and soon find evidence linking similar incidents with the same employer, chiropractor and insurance adjuster. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An angry woman who blames her former daughter-in-law's new husband for her son's death hires a hitman to exact retribution. Briscoe and Curtis manage to get their hands on the contract killer but fail to understand why his customer has gone to such extreme lengths

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a role-playing game believed to have caused the death of a sailor who was found at the bottom of the sea in his dress whites. Discovering the dead man was a compulsive player, Gibbs and the crew try to find out how far he would have gone to exact revenge on his arch-enemy, another seaman. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. Declared a deserter, he was given a dishonourable discharge - chiefly because $1million went missing from his ship's safe on the day he vanished. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, Tony and Kate board an aircraft carrier to investigate the deaths of two crewmen who appear to have overdosed, even though the pair had no history of drug use. At first the inquiry seems doomed to failure - until training tapes offer an unlikely lead. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Isabel does some digging into McKenna's past, Nico has a big decision to make and the team continues to investigate Squeakie's murder and the heist

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are led to a terminally ill bank robber after a man is blown up by what he thought was a fake bomb. The pair discover the crook is planning to take both his own life and that of the accomplice he has enlisted to assist him with his final heist. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A gamer is murdered, and when the investigation links him to a gang of hi-tech thieves using spyware to commit fraud, Goren is forced to delve into his own past for clues. Away from the case, Eames gives birth. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A member of a women's empowerment group is found murdered and her body mutilated, leading officers to the group's charismatic male leader. Meanwhile, Rollins keeps her pregnancy under wraps to avoid going on desk duty, while Fin and Carisi wonder who the father might be

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Newly gained artifacts take Nick and Monroe closer to the source of a long-gestating mystery. Elsewhere, Black Claw makes a deadly move that threatens to send Portland into disarray. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Monroe find a treasure in Germany that has been hidden for centuries, while back in Portland, Renard joins Hank and Wu to track down a deadly assassin

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are convinced that former career criminal Cally Lonegan has killed his business partner who had been stealing company money. However, their suspect has a cast iron alibi - he is a Mob informant and at the time of the murder was being followed by the FBI. The case takes a more complicated turn when an eyewitness is found dead and the detectives discover Lonegan has a twin brother

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the attempted murder of a tough judge, but when the culprit is found Carmichael and McCoy have a difficult time building a case. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is murdered during an apparent road-rage incident, and the officers unravel a conspiracy involving arson. American crime drama starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to identify the charred remains of a woman caught in an apartment block fire, which was started deliberately. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn battle the lawyers over the fatal shooting of an uninvited nightclub guest who was seen confronting popular rap star Darry 'G-Trane' moments before the murder. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of three. A witness reveals that personal trainer Newman flew to Los Angeles on the night of the murder, leading the officers to believe they have the wrong man. When blood matching the dead film studio executive's is found in their new suspect's car, they soon arrest him but their case may not be clear-cut enough to warrant a conviction. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The partially dissolved body of a submariner is discovered in a tub of acid at a Navy base - but Gibbs discovers no crew members have been reported missing and deduces an imposter has assumed the dead man's identity. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The investigators head for Cuba to look into the mysterious death of a Navy translator stationed at Guantanamo Bay. Discovering a terrorist is plotting to kill one of his own accomplices, they try to thwart the plan before tragedy occurs. Starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to exhume the body of a marine in a bid to ascertain whether a phone call to his widow, allegedly from beyond the grave, was a malicious hoax or evidence that he is still alive. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives have their work cut out for them when three major cases all come in at midnight. Meanwhile, Tensions boil over between Rollins and Carisi

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Eames and Goren's investigation into the murder of a pharmaceutical salesman found cut in half uncovers a web of corruption involving fraud, bribery, identity theft and a conspiracy to sell contaminated blood. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren reflects on his youthful sporting endeavours as he tries to track down the killer of a high-school basketball star who had gone missing and the private investigator hired to find him. Interviews with his classmates and friends reveal shady links to gambling syndicates. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates an attack on a homeless woman with a dual personality, who subsequently goes missing

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of apparent random shootings in the city. The team knows that the killings are connected and identifies the criminal as a missing man who was subjected to abuse as a child, but Chief Carver refuses to make the information public, clashing with Mac in the process. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A local maskmaker targets Wesen to create Luchador masks that bestow great power to their wearers. As Nick, Hank, Monroe and Rosalee work to stop the killings, Renard considers an offer that will bring him closer to claiming his destiny. Meanwhile, Eve's further investigation of a recent incident raises new questions. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Following a brutal attack in the woods, Nick and Hank stumble upon a terrifying Wesen disease that may be the inspiration for the modern-day werewolf myth. Meanwhile, Adalind is offered an uneasy alliance that may help her get back what she wants most and Eve's investigation uncovers a surprising revelation. Ann Cusack guest stars

The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Jessica joins in the hunt for a missing manuscript, but the sudden death of author Nick Cullhane turns her quest into a murder investigation. Jerry Orbach guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The investigators head for Cuba to look into the mysterious death of a Navy translator stationed at Guantanamo Bay. Discovering a terrorist is plotting to kill one of his own accomplices, they try to thwart the plan before tragedy occurs. Starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to exhume the body of a marine in a bid to ascertain whether a phone call to his widow, allegedly from beyond the grave, was a malicious hoax or evidence that he is still alive. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a woman killed in what appears to be a road rage incident. However, as they retrace her last actions, they suspect she was accidentally murdered by an assassin following the wrong car. The intended victim turns out to be a reporter claiming to have uncovered a plot to rig an election by a senator, who Briscoe suspects of having connections with the Mafia

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a female jogger is found in a park, and detectives Briscoe and Green discover she was mauled to death by a pit-bull terrier. The race is on to trace the animal and its owner before another tragedy occurs - and the team is shocked to discover a warehouse where dogs are trained for illegal fighting. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The officers leap into action when a financial planner is killed in her apartment building. It soon becomes apparent that the culprit could be a hit-man who was intending to murder someone else who happened to resemble the victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate when a priest is found murdered in the confessional booth. The arrest of a teenager with a grudge seems to have them on the right track, but after discovering that the clergyman wasn't the killer's intended target they begin to focus their search on a petrol station cashier. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Conclusion of a three-part story. The investigation into a movie studio boss's murder becomes further complicated when fresh evidence points to yet another suspect. Meanwhile, the ex-husband of the deceased goes to trial to face accusations of having a hand in the crime - is an innocent man about to be convicted? Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is buried alive, but manages to claw her way out of the grave. The only thing she remembers is that someone has planted a bomb on board a Navy ship - but in the process of trying to learn her identity, the team discovers things are not as they seem. Sherilyn Fenn (Twin Peaks) guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A severed leg bearing a marine tattoo is discovered in a rubbish bin. Once the victim is identified, Gibbs and the crew follow the trail back to a small town, where an insurance fraud seems to have taken place. American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a man overboard fatality from a Navy destroyer at sea. Torres is frustrated with Vance's assignment to mentor three high school students. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Wilmer Valderrama

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A girl takes desperate measures to avenge the years of abuse and neglect inflicted upon her by her psychotherapist parents. The events that follow culminate in tragedy for a man caught up in their promiscuity, mind games and competitiveness. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames uncover how a rich woman's lust for fame and a professional fundraiser's desperation to pay off a loan shark may have led to the murder of two people. Police drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Hard-hitting series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department. The team confront an unthinkable crime when they are called in to investigate the murder of a father and his two young children who have been stabbed to death while sleeping

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The famous chef of a trendy New York City restaurant has accused of sexual assault by three employees but never been arrested - until now. When waitress Kayla Morgan realises that she was sexually assaulted in a taxi after an after-hours VIP party, charges are pressed against the chef, though Benson and Stone hit an immovable obstacle when they try to prosecute the case

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank suspect Wesen involvement after encountering a once-beautiful woman who seems to have aged 70 years overnight before dying. The investigation leads to a local doctor and Rosalee is enlisted to help find the truth. Meanwhile, Eve takes bold steps to learn more about Captain Renard's nefarious dealings. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Bree Turner

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)

programme.desc: A deaf-mute Balkans orphan is kidnapped and forced to work in a brothel, looking after the women who have been imprisoned there as sex slaves for the military. programme.desc: Gilby, Ylvi and Vic are stranded when heavy rain makes a river burst its banks - and to make matters worse, they are chased up a tree by a bear

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: As the destruction caused by Hitler's V1s in London and the south of England reached critical proportions, a new fighter was introduced to challenge the enemy's flying bombs. Wing Commander 'Bee' Beaumont remembers his first encounters with the Tempest, and the Wilkinson family from Croydon share their account of life on the ground with help from their day-to-day diary

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Forty Thousand Horsemen (1941)
programme.desc: Three Australian volunteers take part in the last cavalry charge in modern warfare while serving in Palestine. First World War drama, starring Grant Taylor and Betty Bryant

programme.title: Heavens Above! (1963)
programme.desc: An idealistic vicar working as a prison chaplain is accidentally reassigned to a conservative middle-class village. He immediately puts his progressive ideas into practice, but finds his genuine belief in charity does not go down well with his snobbish congregation. Satirical comedy, starring Peter Sellers and Eric Sykes

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lonely residents of the street find company with each other as Christmas arrives. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael Caine buys a birthday present for Mrs Huggett. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Freehold (2017)
programme.desc: Fast-talking estate agent Hussein finds his personal and professional life unravelling as a wronged former client takes his revenge. Comedy horror, starring Javier Botet, Mandeep Dhillon and Mim Shaikh

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Elsa Fraulein SS (1977)
programme.desc: A sadistic Nazi prison guard oversees a train full of sex slaves, who are to be transported to the front lines. Asd she adopts brutal measures to keep her charges in submission, the French resistance plot to set the women free. Thriller, starring Malisa Longo and Olivier Mathot

programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.desc: When an actor is murdered, Detective Inspector Gregory quickly discovers that the victim had many enemies. Drama, starring Jack Hawkins, Donald Wolfit and Ian Hunter

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part one. Controversy surrounds the appointment of the first female priest at the famous London cathedral

programme.title: London Live News

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The extraordinary stories of some of the British men and women who fought or lived through the Second World War, now in their nineties or older. The first episode looks at how national unity was tested in the 1920s and 30s with class conflict, soaring unemployment and widespread civil unrest, but despite these upheavals, those growing up in the inter-war years remember much that was positive about life in Britain at the time. When war broke out in 1939, the men and women of this generation were ready to risk their lives for their country, but the evacuation of the British Army from the beaches of Dunkirk was a wake-up call for those expecting a swift victory

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice (2012)
programme.desc: A bumbling teenager is offered a job by his mother's crime boss boyfriend. He is given the task of driving one of the gangster's business associates around town, only to find himself an assistant to a hitman on his last assignment, a mission that leads to a deadly encounter with a mysterious woman. Thriller, starring Tim Roth, Jack O'Connell and Talulah Riley

programme.title: Emmanuelle in Soho (1981)
programme.desc: A woman seeking fame and fortune in Soho plays a pivotal role in the struggling marriage of a photographer and his wife, and conspires with them on a plot to blackmail a pornography producer. Erotic drama, starring Angie Quick and Julie Lee

programme.title: Live FNF
programme.desc: Leicester City v Newcastle United (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the Premier Legue match from King Power Stadium, as both teams battle it out for three important points. Brendan Rodgers' side are looking to complete the double against the Magpies after winning 2-1 at St. James' Park back in early January. Second-half goals from James Maddison and Youri Tielemans were enough to secure the win.
